blocking_items.detail: The implementation is local and nonlaunching. A new content-addressed Node1 package must bind the frozen V2.5 model/trainer/real1507 runner, role optimizer core, rank V1.1 core, delta-noise receipt, ESM2 identity, graph/contact inputs, and split manifests.
The running V2.5 301-job DAG must not be modified. CUDA replay requires a separate runtime and GPUs after an explicit package audit.

CPU tests prove B/E scalar trajectory equality and F kappa clipping, but Node1 BF16/CUDA must replay at least 20 matched B/E steps and verify max shared/scalar parameter delta <=1e-7, RNG restoration, exact-min, optimizer ownership, and finite states.
No V2.6 outer/inner job graph, checkpoint writer, prediction freezer, or evaluator has been created. This package is an integration primitive, not an authorized formal run.
